tasks.subject: Task 1: Next.js scaffold with TypeScript strict, Tailwind, shadcn/ui primitives
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bootstrap Next.js 15 (App Router) + TS strict + Tailwind + shadcn primitives so `npm run dev` boots and `npm run build` succeeds.

**Files:** package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.mjs, tailwind.config.ts, postcss.config.mjs, app/layout.tsx, app/page.tsx, app/globals.css, components/ui/{button,input,label,card,form}.tsx, lib/utils.ts, components.json

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck && npm run build` exits 0.

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","tsconfig.json","next.config.mjs","tailwind.config.ts","app/","components/ui/","lib/utils.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run typecheck && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["npm install completes","npm run dev serves placeholder","npm run build + typecheck succeed","tsconfig has strict + @/* alias","Tailwind classes work","shadcn Button renders"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Env validation with zod + .env.example
tasks.description:
**Goal:** parseEnv() fails fast on missing/malformed env; .env.example documents every required key.

**Files:** lib/types/env.ts, .env.example, tests/unit/env.test.ts

**Verify:** Test runs in Task 11; pre-Task-11 verify by importing in app/page.tsx temporarily.

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/types/env.ts",".env.example","tests/unit/env.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/unit/env.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["parseEnv returns typed obj when all vars present","throws readable error naming missing key",".env.example documents every key","result cached after first call"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Docker compose for Postgres (dev + test databases)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `docker compose up -d` brings up Postgres 16 with both `conto` and `conto_test` databases; data persists via named volume.

**Files:** docker-compose.yml, scripts/db-init.sql

**Verify:** docker compose exec postgres psql -U conto -c "\\l" shows both databases.

```json:metadata
{"files":["docker-compose.yml","scripts/db-init.sql"],"verifyCommand":"docker compose up -d && sleep 3 && docker compose exec postgres psql -U conto -c \"\\l\"","acceptanceCriteria":["Postgres 16 starts on :5432","both conto and conto_test databases exist","named volume persists across restart","docker compose down -v cleans up"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Drizzle scaffold + full schema + initial migration with RLS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All PLAN.md §4 tables (incl. Plan A deltas) + Better Auth tables in schema.ts; initial migration applies cleanly with RLS policies on every domain table.

**Files:** drizzle.config.ts, lib/db/client.ts (with withUser helper), lib/db/schema.ts, lib/db/migrations/0000_init.sql, tests/integration/db/schema.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run db:migrate` applies cleanly + schema.test passes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["drizzle.config.ts","lib/db/client.ts","lib/db/schema.ts","lib/db/migrations/","tests/integration/db/schema.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run db:migrate && npm test -- tests/integration/db/schema.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["all §4 tables exist","Plan A deltas present (deduction flag, receipt slot, recurrence_groups, pay_cadences, expected_events, cashflow_buffer_cents, payslips.cadence)","users dropped password_hash; added email_verified/name/image/updated_at","Better Auth tables (session/account/verification) present","RLS enabled on every domain table with current_setting('app.user_id') policy","partial index expected_events_pending_idx exists","unique index on transactions(account_id, posted_date, amount_cents, description_raw)","withUser(userId, fn) helper exported"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: AU subcategory seed + db:seed script
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `npm run db:seed` populates AU deductible subcategories per ADR-9; idempotent.

**Files:** lib/db/seeds/au-subcategories.ts, lib/db/seeds/index.ts, scripts/db-reset.ts, tests/integration/db/seed.test.ts

**Verify:** seed creates ≥1 row per deduction_kind (5 kinds); 2nd run produces same row count.

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/db/seeds/","scripts/db-reset.ts","tests/integration/db/seed.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run db:seed && npm test -- tests/integration/db/seed.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["≥1 subcategory per deduction_kind: wfh, donation, work_tools, motor_vehicle, professional_sub","is_deductible_candidate=true and user_id=null on seeded rows","idempotent across runs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Better Auth server config + catch-all route + getCurrentUserId
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Better Auth wired to Drizzle; sign-up/in/out work via /api/auth/[...all]; getCurrentUserId() returns id or throws UnauthenticatedError.

**Files:** lib/auth/better-auth.ts, lib/auth/server.ts, app/api/auth/[...all]/route.ts, tests/integration/auth/sign-up.test.ts

**Verify:** sign-up.test.ts passes — sign up creates user+account+session; sign-in rejects bad credentials.

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/auth/better-auth.ts","lib/auth/server.ts","app/api/auth/","tests/integration/auth/"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/integration/auth/sign-up.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["POST /api/auth/sign-up/email creates user+account+session","POST /api/auth/sign-in/email returns session cookie","POST /api/auth/sign-out invalidates session","getCurrentUserId returns id or throws UnauthenticatedError","uses existing schema tables from Task 4"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Better Auth client + sign-in / sign-up / dashboard pages + nav
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Browser flow works end-to-end: /sign-up → submit → /dashboard → sign-out → /sign-in.

**Files:** lib/auth/client.ts, app/sign-in/page.tsx, app/sign-up/page.tsx, app/(authenticated)/layout.tsx, app/(authenticated)/dashboard/page.tsx, components/nav.tsx, app/page.tsx (modify)

**Verify:** Manual smoke; covered by Playwright in Task 12.

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/auth/client.ts","app/sign-in/","app/sign-up/","app/(authenticated)/","components/nav.tsx","app/page.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"manual smoke + Playwright in Task 12","acceptanceCriteria":["/ redirects to /sign-in (logged out) or /dashboard (logged in)","/sign-up form submits and lands on /dashboard","/sign-in form submits and lands on /dashboard","/dashboard shows user name/email + Upload link","nav has working sign-out button","form validation errors surface inline"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: R2 storage client + putObject helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** putObject() PUTs to Cloudflare R2 and returns user-prefixed key per ADR-1.

**Files:** lib/storage/r2.ts, lib/storage/put-object.ts, tests/integration/storage/put-object.test.ts

**Verify:** put-object.test.ts passes against real R2 bucket.

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/storage/","tests/integration/storage/"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/integration/storage/put-object.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["returns key starting with ${userId}/","object retrievable via HEAD afterward","sanitises unsafe filenames","failure modes throw readable errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: pg-boss singleton + worker entry + noop handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Worker process runs forever; logs `[noop]` payload when noop job is sent.

**Files:** lib/jobs/boss.ts, lib/jobs/noop.ts, lib/jobs/index.ts, lib/jobs/worker.ts, tests/integration/jobs/noop.test.ts

**Verify:** noop.test.ts passes (start, send, work, receive).

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/jobs/","tests/integration/jobs/"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/integration/jobs/noop.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["worker:dev logs [worker] ready","boss.send('noop', payload) causes worker to log it","SIGINT/SIGTERM handled gracefully","pg-boss schema initialised on first start"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Upload route + page (the Phase 0 demo)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Authenticated user submits file at /upload → server PUTs to R2 → enqueues noop → page shows R2 key → worker logs noop.

**Files:** app/(authenticated)/upload/page.tsx, app/api/upload/route.ts, lib/jobs/boss.ts (refactor for lazy start), lib/jobs/worker.ts (use getBossRaw), tests/integration/api/upload.test.ts

**Verify:** upload.test.ts passes (401 unauthenticated path); manual smoke completes the demo.

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/api/upload/","app/(authenticated)/upload/","lib/jobs/boss.ts","lib/jobs/worker.ts","tests/integration/api/upload.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- tests/integration/api/upload.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["POST /api/upload with session+file returns {ok, key} and enqueues noop","POST /api/upload no session returns 401","POST /api/upload no file returns 400","R2 PUT failure returns 502 without enqueueing","page renders form and displays returned key on success"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Vitest config + db helpers + smoke test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `npm test` runs all unit + integration tests; resetTestDb + seedUserAndAccount helpers exist.

**Files:** vitest.config.ts, tests/helpers/db.ts, tests/unit/smoke.test.ts (finalise)

**Verify:** `npm test` exits 0 with all integration tests from Tasks 2/4/5/6/8/9/10 passing.

```json:metadata
{"files":["vitest.config.ts","tests/helpers/db.ts","tests/unit/smoke.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test","acceptanceCriteria":["npm test runs unit + integration","smoke + env tests pass","all integration tests from Tasks 4/5/6/8/9/10 pass","resetTestDb truncates all domain tables in dep order","seedUserAndAccount creates user via Better Auth + accounts row"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Playwright config + e2e happy path
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Playwright test exercises full Phase 0 demo: sign-up → upload → success message with user-prefixed key.

**Files:** playwright.config.ts, tests/e2e/auth-and-upload.spec.ts, tests/e2e/global-setup.ts, tests/fixtures/hello.txt

**Verify:** `npm run test:e2e` passes against fresh test DB; webServer config starts dev + worker.

```json:metadata
{"files":["playwright.config.ts","tests/e2e/","tests/fixtures/hello.txt"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test:e2e","acceptanceCriteria":["webServer starts npm run dev + npm run worker:dev","globalSetup resets test DB","signs up fresh user, uploads hello.txt, asserts success message","asserts key matches uuid/uuid/hello.txt shape","uses TEST_DATABASE_URL not DATABASE_URL"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: ADR-12, README, PLAN.md updates, Changelog v0.3
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Codify Phase 0 implementation in planning docs. ADR-12 (Better Auth supersedes ADR-2 option). PLAN.md §2/§4/changelog updates. README runnable getting-started.

**Files:** Docs/adr/012-better-auth.md (create), Docs/PLAN.md (modify), README.md (modify)

**Verify:** Test-Path ADR-12; PLAN.md contains ADR-12/email_verified/v0.3 (2026; README contains docker compose up + npm run worker:dev + Phase 0 — foundation.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Docs/adr/012-better-auth.md","Docs/PLAN.md","README.md"],"verifyCommand":"Test-Path Docs/adr/012-better-auth.md && Select-String -Path Docs/PLAN.md -Pattern 'ADR-12','email_verified','v0.3'","acceptanceCriteria":["ADR-12 file exists with Status/Context/Decision/Consequences","PLAN.md §2 lists ADR-12 one-liner","PLAN.md §4 users dropped password_hash + added email_verified/name/image/updated_at","PLAN.md changelog v0.3 (2026-05-04) entry","README replaces TBD with runnable steps","README status reads 'Phase 0 — foundation'"]}
```
